comment: Krita iPadOS app icon. Phase 0 scaffolding — see packaging/ios/README.md. Provide a single 1024x1024 PNG (no alpha) as AppIcon-1024.png; Xcode 14+ downscales it for every slot. Source art lives under pics/ (e.g. pics/branding/256-apps-calligrakrita.png upscaled, or the SVG logo rendered at 1024).
